RADIO AND AMPLIFIER INTEGRATION SOLUTIONS

**Seamless Solutions to Enhance and Retain Your Vehicle's Factory Features**

Easily upgrade your car’s entertainment system while preserving original functionalities. Whether you’re replacing your radio or amplifier, we provide innovative integration solutions tailored to your vehicle.

Browse compatible solutions for your vehicle

Amplifier Solutions

## Flashing Tools

New

![Maestro Central](https://images.idatalink.com/maestro-website-2/flashing_tool/f42ba79608d730059629878ae8322f3f.jpeg)

### Maestro Central

#### Android and iOS

Compatible with A2B, AR2, mSR

Flash compatible Maestro modules. Customize and configure amplifier, radio, and vehicle features such as steering wheel controls, amplifier output configuration, etc. Also used to control vehicle settings when using radios without full Maestro compatibility.

[Learn more](https://www.idatalinkmaestro.com/en/flashing-tools)

New

![Weblink Maestro](https://images.idatalink.com/maestro-website-2/flashing_tool/9fb87a28db9eeec19543d5a1ce162c64.jpeg)

### Weblink Maestro

#### Android and iOS

Compatible with RR2

Program, customize and configure radio and vehicle features, such as: steering wheel controls, vehicle settings , and more.

[Learn more](https://www.idatalinkmaestro.com/en/flashing-tools)

New

![Weblink Desktop](https://images.idatalink.com/maestro-website-2/flashing_tool/c35ebea917156d5c25956117ab8cff77.jpeg)

### Weblink Desktop

#### Windows and Apple software

Compatible with all Maestro products

Program, customize and configure radio and vehicle features, such as: steering wheel controls, vehicle settings , and more.

[Learn more](https://www.idatalinkmaestro.com/en/flashing-tools)

## Our partners

Shopping for a car radio, amplifier or radar detector? Maestro works hand in hand with the world's top mobile electronics providers to offer you the most complete and reliable vehicle integration solutions available. Look for iDatalink-compatible products from the following partners:

## Installers near me

iDatalink Maestro products are developed by Automotive Data Solutions, Inc., a manufacturer of high-quality aftermarket integration products that retain and enhance your vehicle's factory functionality.
